name: pi-ca-leash
description: Runtime-first Claude Code leash extension for pi

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pi-claude-code-agent/runtime && npm run build --workspace @pi-claude-code-agent/intercom-bridge && npm run build --workspace @pi-claude-code-agent/subagents-backend && npm run build --workspace @pi-claude-code-agent/teams-backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces && npm run test:extension
scripts.plan:check: echo 'Runtime + intercom bridge + subagents backend + teams backend implemented as local MVP packages'
